subcodes.first_line: The ocean of tribulation hath surged, and the waves have encompassed the Ark of God, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting. O Mariner, be thou not dismayed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ماج بحر البلاء و احاطت الامواج فلک الله المهیمن القیوم ان یا ملاح لاتضطرب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
